title: Polym
description: Polym is a mod that serves the purpose of solving currency issues in the server
body:
Polym is mod for adding a some coin to minecraft but not changing game machanic.
There are 9 recipe coin. And only 1 recipe can craft from minecraft material. But they can craft to each other.
![Polym Crafting Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a081c9f5aa728d99f7fd0623524a392962b1adf7.png)

![Polym Coin Item Group](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec2b4327163d6d9ac902897b4b4e0c11429ff034.png)
I create this mod for me and my friend or anyone that need a currency to trading
